Nicolas Poussin

9 works in the gallery.

by Nicolas Poussin
France · 1614–1665 · Brush and black ink and gray wash

by Nicolas Poussin
France · 1614–1665 · Red chalk on cream laid paper
The Return of the Holy Family to Nazareth
by Nicolas Poussin
France, 17th century · c. 1627 · oil on canvas
Nymphs and a Satyr (Amor Vincit Omnia)
by Nicolas Poussin
France, 17th century · c. 1625–27 · oil on canvas
Landscape with Saint John on Patmos
by Nicolas Poussin
France · Renaissance · 1640 · Oil on canvas

by Nicolas Poussin
France, 17th century · 1643–1644 · pen and brown ink

by Nicolas Poussin
